examples: Before my accident, I could easily do a headstand.
After all, the pose is called Headstand, not Forearmstand.
When you find your line in Headstand, it's a beautiful thing.
Yoga unites body and mind, and while she led meditations and could do a headstand, Lee's lifelong negative body image plagued her.
One man with no limbs did a headstand on his skateboard.
